mapper.select: SELECT id, client_id, client_name, client_type, owner_principal_id, service_account_principal_id, tenant_id, client_secret_hash, client_secret_expires_at, client_auth_methods, authorization_grant_types, redirect_uris, scopes, require_pkce, require_consent, enable_flag FROM dc3_oauth_registered_client WHERE client_id = #{clientId} AND deleted = 0 LIMIT 1
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO dc3_oauth_registered_client (id, client_id, client_name, client_type, owner_principal_id, service_account_principal_id, tenant_id, client_secret_hash, client_secret_expires_at, client_auth_methods, authorization_grant_types, redirect_uris, scopes, require_pkce, require_consent, enable_flag, client_settings, token_settings, creator_id, creator_name, operator_id, operator_name) VALUES (#{id}, #{clientId}, #{clientName}, #{clientType}, #{ownerPrincipalId}, #{serviceAccountPrincipalId}, #{tenantId}, #{clientSecretHash}, #{clientSecretExpiresAt}, #{clientAuthMethods}, #{authorizationGrantTypes}, #{redirectUris}, #{scopes}, #{requirePkce}, #{requireConsent}, #{enableFlag}, '{}'::JSON, '{}'::JSON, #{ownerPrincipalId}, #{clientName}, #{ownerPrincipalId}, #{clientName})
mapper.select: SELECT id, client_id, client_name, client_type, owner_principal_id, service_account_principal_id, tenant_id, '' AS client_secret_hash, client_secret_expires_at, client_auth_methods, authorization_grant_types, redirect_uris, scopes, require_pkce, require_consent, enable_flag FROM dc3_oauth_registered_client WHERE owner_principal_id = #{ownerPrincipalId} AND (tenant_id = 0 OR tenant_id = #{tenantId}) AND deleted = 0 ORDER BY create_time DESC, id DESC LIMIT 200

SELECT id, registered_client_id, client_id, principal_id, principal_type, tenant_id, mcp_connection_id, authorization_grant_type, authorized_scopes, state_hash, authorization_code_hash, authorization_code_issued, authorization_code_expires, access_token_jti, access_token_issued, access_token_expires, refresh_token_hash, refresh_token_issued, refresh_token_expires, token_metadata::TEXT AS token_metadata, revoked_time, revoke_reason FROM dc3_oauth_authorization WHERE authorization_code_hash = #{codeHash} AND deleted = 0 LIMIT 1

SELECT id, registered_client_id, client_id, principal_id, principal_type, tenant_id, mcp_connection_id, authorization_grant_type, authorized_scopes, state_hash, authorization_code_hash, authorization_code_issued, authorization_code_expires, access_token_jti, access_token_issued, access_token_expires, refresh_token_hash, refresh_token_issued, refresh_token_expires, token_metadata::TEXT AS token_metadata, revoked_time, revoke_reason FROM dc3_oauth_authorization WHERE access_token_jti = #{jti} AND deleted = 0 LIMIT 1

SELECT id, registered_client_id, client_id, principal_id, principal_type, tenant_id, mcp_connection_id, authorization_grant_type, authorized_scopes, state_hash, authorization_code_hash, authorization_code_issued, authorization_code_expires, access_token_jti, access_token_issued, access_token_expires, refresh_token_hash, previous_refresh_token_hash, refresh_token_issued, refresh_token_expires, token_metadata::TEXT AS token_metadata, revoked_time, revoke_reason FROM dc3_oauth_authorization WHERE refresh_token_hash = #{refreshHash} AND deleted = 0 LIMIT 1

SELECT id, registered_client_id, client_id, principal_id, principal_type, tenant_id, mcp_connection_id, authorization_grant_type, authorized_scopes, state_hash, authorization_code_hash, authorization_code_issued, authorization_code_expires, access_token_jti, access_token_issued, access_token_expires, refresh_token_hash, previous_refresh_token_hash, refresh_token_issued, refresh_token_expires, token_metadata::TEXT AS token_metadata, revoked_time, revoke_reason FROM dc3_oauth_authorization WHERE previous_refresh_token_hash = #{previousRefreshHash} AND deleted = 0 LIMIT 1
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO dc3_oauth_authorization (id, registered_client_id, client_id, principal_id, principal_type, tenant_id, mcp_connection_id, authorization_grant_type, authorized_scopes, state_hash, authorization_code_hash, authorization_code_issued, authorization_code_expires, token_claims, token_metadata) VALUES (#{id}, #{registeredClientId}, #{clientId}, #{principalId}, #{principalType}, #{tenantId}, #{mcpConnectionId}, #{authorizationGrantType}, #{authorizedScopes}, #{stateHash}, #{authorizationCodeHash}, #{authorizationCodeIssued}, #{authorizationCodeExpires}, '{}'::JSON, CAST(#{tokenMetadata} AS JSON))
mapper.update: UPDATE dc3_oauth_authorization SET authorization_code_hash = #{codeHash}, access_token_jti = #{accessTokenJti}, access_token_issued = #{accessIssued}, access_token_expires = #{accessExpires}, refresh_token_hash = #{refreshHash}, previous_refresh_token_hash = #{previousRefreshHash}, refresh_token_issued = #{refreshIssued}, refresh_token_expires = #{refreshExpires}, token_claims = CAST(#{tokenClaims} AS JSON), operate_time = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted = 0
UPDATE dc3_oauth_authorization SET revoked_time = #{revokedTime}, revoke_reason = #{reason}, operate_time = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE access_token_jti = #{jti} AND deleted = 0
UPDATE dc3_oauth_authorization SET revoked_time = #{revokedTime}, revoke_reason = #{reason}, operate_time = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE refresh_token_hash = #{refreshHash} AND deleted = 0
mapper.select: SELECT id, connection_name, client_id, principal_id, principal_type, tenant_id, grant_type, enable_flag, expire_time, revoke_time, last_used_time, creator_id, creator_name FROM dc3_mcp_connection WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted = 0 LIMIT 1

SELECT id, connection_name, client_id, principal_id, principal_type, tenant_id, grant_type, enable_flag, expire_time, revoke_time, last_used_time FROM dc3_mcp_connection WHERE client_id = #{clientId} AND principal_id = #{principalId} AND tenant_id = #{tenantId} AND grant_type = #{grantType} AND enable_flag = 0 AND revoke_time IS NULL AND (expire_time IS NULL OR expire_time > CURRENT_TIMESTAMP) AND deleted = 0 ORDER BY id ASC LIMIT 1

SELECT id, connection_name, client_id, principal_id, principal_type, tenant_id, grant_type, enable_flag, expire_time, revoke_time, last_used_time, creator_id, creator_name FROM dc3_mcp_connection WHERE tenant_id = #{tenantId} AND creator_id = #{principalId} AND deleted = 0 ORDER BY create_time DESC, id DESC LIMIT 200
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO dc3_mcp_connection (id, connection_name, client_id, principal_id, principal_type, tenant_id, grant_type, enable_flag, expire_time, connection_ext, remark, creator_id, creator_name, operator_id, operator_name) VALUES (#{id}, #{connectionName}, #{clientId}, #{principalId}, #{principalType}, #{tenantId}, #{grantType}, #{enableFlag}, #{expireTime}, '{}'::JSON, #{remark}, #{creatorId}, #{creatorName}, #{creatorId}, #{creatorName})
mapper.select: SELECT NULL::BIGINT AS id, api.api_code AS tool_id, lower(regexp_replace(api.service_name || '_' || api.api_name || '_' || CASE api.api_type_flag WHEN 0 THEN 'post' WHEN 1 THEN 'delete' WHEN 2 THEN 'put' ELSE 'get' END, '[^a-zA-Z0-9]+', '_', 'g')) AS tool_name, COALESCE( NULLIF((api.api_ext ->> 'content')::json ->> 'title', ''), NULLIF(api.api_name, ''), api.api_code) AS tool_title, api.service_name AS tool_category, api.service_name, api.api_code, resource.resource_code AS permission_code, CASE api.api_type_flag WHEN 0 THEN 'POST' WHEN 1 THEN 'DELETE' WHEN 2 THEN 'PUT' ELSE 'GET' END AS http_method, regexp_replace(api.api_code, '^[^:]+:[^:]+:', '') AS api_path, md5(api.api_code || ':' || api.api_name) AS schema_hash, 0 AS enable_flag, COALESCE( NULLIF((api.api_ext ->> 'content')::json ->> 'remark', ''), NULLIF(api.remark, ''), api.api_group) AS remark FROM dc3_api api JOIN dc3_resource resource ON resource.entity_id = api.id AND resource.resource_type_flag = 6 AND resource.deleted = 0 WHERE api.deleted = 0 AND api.enable_flag = 0 AND api.api_code != ''
SELECT * FROM dc3_mcp_tool_catalog WHERE tool_id = #{toolId} AND deleted = 0 LIMIT 1

SELECT * FROM dc3_mcp_tool_catalog WHERE deleted = 0 AND enable_flag = 0 AND (#{riskLevel}::text IS NULL OR #{riskLevel}::text = '' OR risk_level = #{riskLevel}::text) AND ( #{keyword}::text IS NULL OR #{keyword}::text = '' OR lower(tool_name) LIKE concat('%', lower(#{keyword}::text), '%') OR lower(tool_title) LIKE concat('%', lower(#{keyword}::text), '%') OR lower(permission_code) LIKE concat('%', lower(#{keyword}::text), '%') ) ORDER BY tool_category, tool_name LIMIT #{limit}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO dc3_mcp_tool_catalog (id, tool_id, tool_name, tool_title, tool_category, service_name, api_code, permission_code, http_method, api_path, schema_hash, risk_level, read_only_hint, destructive_hint, idempotent_hint, open_world_hint, enable_flag, tool_ext, remark, creator_id, creator_name, operator_id, operator_name) VALUES (#{id}, #{toolId}, #{toolName}, #{toolTitle}, #{toolCategory}, #{serviceName}, #{apiCode}, #{permissionCode}, #{httpMethod}, #{apiPath}, #{schemaHash}, #{riskLevel}, #{readOnlyHint}, #{destructiveHint}, #{idempotentHint}, #{openWorldHint}, #{enableFlag}, COALESCE(NULLIF(#{toolExt}, '')::json, '{}'::json), #{remark}, 0, 'system', 0, 'system')
mapper.update: UPDATE dc3_mcp_tool_catalog SET tool_name = #{toolName}, tool_title = #{toolTitle}, tool_category = #{toolCategory}, service_name = #{serviceName}, api_code = #{apiCode}, permission_code = #{permissionCode}, http_method = #{httpMethod}, api_path = #{apiPath}, schema_hash = #{schemaHash}, risk_level = #{riskLevel}, read_only_hint = #{readOnlyHint}, destructive_hint = #{destructiveHint}, idempotent_hint = #{idempotentHint}, open_world_hint = #{openWorldHint}, enable_flag = #{enableFlag}, tool_ext = COALESCE(NULLIF(#{toolExt}, '')::json, '{}'::json), remark = #{remark}, operate_time = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted = 0
mapper.sql: SELECT DISTINCT resource.resource_code FROM dc3_role_principal_bind role_principal JOIN dc3_role_resource_bind role_resource ON role_resource.role_id = role_principal.role_id AND role_resource.deleted = 0 JOIN dc3_resource resource ON resource.id = role_resource.resource_id AND resource.deleted = 0 AND resource.enable_flag = 0 WHERE role_principal.tenant_id = #{tenantId} AND role_principal.principal_id = #{principalId} AND role_principal.deleted = 0
mapper.select:
WITH perms AS (
) SELECT tool.* FROM dc3_mcp_connection connection JOIN dc3_mcp_connection_tool whitelist ON whitelist.connection_id = connection.id AND whitelist.enable_flag = 0 AND whitelist.deleted = 0 JOIN dc3_mcp_tool_catalog tool ON tool.tool_id = whitelist.tool_id AND tool.enable_flag = 0 AND tool.deleted = 0 WHERE connection.id = #{connectionId} AND connection.tenant_id = #{tenantId} AND connection.principal_id = #{principalId} AND connection.enable_flag = 0 AND connection.revoke_time IS NULL AND (connection.expire_time IS NULL OR connection.expire_time > CURRENT_TIMESTAMP) AND connection.deleted = 0 AND (#{allowHighRisk} = TRUE OR tool.risk_level != 'HIGH') AND ( tool.permission_code = '' OR EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM perms WHERE resource_code = '*') OR tool.permission_code IN (SELECT resource_code FROM perms) ) ORDER BY tool.tool_category, tool.tool_name

WITH perms AS (
) SELECT tool.* FROM dc3_mcp_connection connection JOIN dc3_mcp_connection_tool whitelist ON whitelist.connection_id = connection.id AND whitelist.enable_flag = 0 AND whitelist.deleted = 0 JOIN dc3_mcp_tool_catalog tool ON tool.tool_id = whitelist.tool_id AND tool.enable_flag = 0 AND tool.deleted = 0 WHERE connection.id = #{connectionId} AND connection.tenant_id = #{tenantId} AND connection.principal_id = #{principalId} AND connection.enable_flag = 0 AND connection.revoke_time IS NULL AND (connection.expire_time IS NULL OR connection.expire_time > CURRENT_TIMESTAMP) AND connection.deleted = 0 AND tool.tool_name = #{toolName} AND (#{allowHighRisk} = TRUE OR tool.risk_level != 'HIGH') AND ( tool.permission_code = '' OR EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM perms WHERE resource_code = '*') OR tool.permission_code IN (SELECT resource_code FROM perms) ) LIMIT 1
mapper.update: UPDATE dc3_mcp_connection SET last_used_time = #{lastUsedTime}, operate_time = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted = 0
UPDATE dc3_mcp_connection_tool SET deleted = 1, operate_time = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE connection_id = #{connectionId} AND deleted = 0
mapper.select: SELECT whitelist.tool_id FROM dc3_mcp_connection connection JOIN dc3_mcp_connection_tool whitelist ON whitelist.connection_id = connection.id AND whitelist.enable_flag = 0 AND whitelist.deleted = 0 WHERE connection.id = #{connectionId} AND connection.tenant_id = #{tenantId} AND connection.creator_id = #{principalId} AND connection.deleted = 0 ORDER BY whitelist.tool_id
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO dc3_mcp_connection_tool (id, connection_id, tool_id, enable_flag, remark, creator_id, creator_name, operator_id, operator_name) VALUES (#{id}, #{connectionId}, #{toolId}, 0, '', #{operatorId}, #{operatorName}, #{operatorId}, #{operatorName})

INSERT INTO dc3_mcp_audit_log (id, trace_id, tenant_id, principal_id, principal_type, client_id, connection_id, tool_id, tool_name, permission_code, risk_level, confirm_id, idempotency_key, argument_digest, status, error_code, duration_ms, client_name, client_version, remote_ip, audit_ext) VALUES (#{id}, #{traceId}, #{tenantId}, #{principalId}, #{principalType}, #{clientId}, #{connectionId}, #{toolId}, #{toolName}, #{permissionCode}, #{riskLevel}, #{confirmId}, #{idempotencyKey}, #{argumentDigest}, #{status}, #{errorCode}, #{durationMs}, #{clientName}, #{clientVersion}, #{remoteIp}, '{}'::JSON)

INSERT INTO dc3_mcp_tool_confirmation (id, confirm_id, tenant_id, principal_id, connection_id, tool_id, argument_digest, idempotency_key, risk_level, status, expire_time) VALUES (#{id}, #{confirmId}, #{tenantId}, #{principalId}, #{connectionId}, #{toolId}, #{argumentDigest}, #{idempotencyKey}, #{riskLevel}, #{status}, #{expireTime})
mapper.select: SELECT id, confirm_id, tenant_id, principal_id, connection_id, tool_id, argument_digest, idempotency_key, risk_level, status, expire_time, consumed_time, create_time FROM dc3_mcp_tool_confirmation WHERE confirm_id = #{confirmId} AND deleted = 0 LIMIT 1

SELECT id, confirm_id, tenant_id, principal_id, connection_id, tool_id, argument_digest, idempotency_key, risk_level, status, expire_time, consumed_time, create_time FROM dc3_mcp_tool_confirmation WHERE connection_id = #{connectionId} AND idempotency_key = #{idempotencyKey} AND status = 'CONSUMED' AND deleted = 0 LIMIT 1
